valid.name: already-between

invalid.name: and-pair
invalid.code: SELECT * FROM t WHERE x >= 1 AND x <= 10;

errors.message: Use `x BETWEEN 1 AND 10` instead of `>= ... AND <=`.

invalid.output: SELECT * FROM t WHERE x BETWEEN 1 AND 10;

errors.message: Use `x BETWEEN '1900-01-01'::TIMESTAMPTZ AND '2299-12-31'::TIMESTAMPTZ` instead of `>= ... AND <=`.
Use `x >= 1 AND x <= 10` instead of `BETWEEN`. Some teams prefer explicit comparisons so the inclusive bounds are obvious to readers.
